questions.question: Define information system. Describe its importance with qualities of a good information System?
Describe the role of security audit in information system? Discuss how multi-layer security strategy can be applied to protect e-commerce systems.
Define enterprise resource planning (ERP). Explain the ERP's function supply chain management in an organization.
Define enterprise engineering. How can enterprise integration provide the means to share data between different applications?
Define Anomaly Detection. Differentiate between OLAP and OLTP.
Define DSS and GDSS. Justify 'AI and Expert System is necessity for business in modern business'.
Define Information System Plan. How does operational, tactical and strategic information system help in IS planning?
Describe the different perspectives used in Balance Scorecard.

Why is navigation important on a website? Explain different types of search engines.
Explain about web usage mining technique.
Define Hadoop System and its components. Explain in details about working mechanism of Map Reduce for voluminous data.

questions.context: There are information systems all around us. We encountered them at the university, in stores and banks, when making airline, hotel or rental-car reservation, and in many other aspects of our daily routine. For this project, choose an information system and critique it. First, describe the system: what are its objectives? Who are the users? Then trace the input of the system to determine who inputs what information. Look at the output the system. Is it a physical document? Often, systems have to store data on a more or less permanent basis in files or in a database? Can you figure out what is in the database for you system? Draw a diagram of the input, processing, database and outputs of the system. What are the major strengths of the system? Do you see any problems with it? What can you suggest to improve the system?
